pain_summary: Entrepreneurs are looking for AI solutions to automate and streamline their business operations.
pitch_copy: 作为创业者，我深知自动化业务流程的重要性。最近发现了一个非常实用的工具——AI API 中转服务，它能帮助你稳定调用 OpenAI/Claude API，轻松实现聊天机器人和各种 AI 开发需求，大大提升了我们的工作效率。
pitch_copy_en: As an entrepreneur, I understand the importance of automating business processes. Recently, I discovered a very useful tool - AI API 中转服务, which helps you stably call OpenAI/Claude APIs, easily enabling chatbot and various AI development needs, significantly improving our work efficiency.

pain_summary: SaaS companies struggle with GDPR compliance, especially when dealing with European customers.
pitch_copy: 对于 SaaS 公司来说，GDPR 合规性是一个大问题，尤其是在处理欧洲客户时。我推荐使用 NordVPN 来保护数据安全，确保符合 GDPR 的要求。这样可以让你的业务更加稳健。
pitch_copy_en: For SaaS companies, GDPR compliance is a big issue, especially when dealing with European customers. I recommend using NordVPN to protect data security and ensure GDPR compliance. This will make your business more robust.

pain_summary: Finding the right cofounders is a major challenge for entrepreneurs, often hindering the startup process.
pitch_copy: 找到合适的联合创始人是创业过程中的一大挑战。我建议你可以通过小报童这样的平台发布你的项目信息，吸引志同道合的人加入。这个平台不仅适合知识变现，还能帮你找到理想的合作伙伴。
pitch_copy_en: Finding the right co-founders is a major challenge in the startup process. I recommend using a platform like 小报童 to post your project information and attract like-minded people. This platform is not only suitable for knowledge monetization but can also help you find ideal partners.

pain_summary: SaaS companies find it difficult to identify and understand their website visitors, leading to missed opportunities.
pitch_copy: SaaS 公司常常难以识别和理解网站访客，导致错失很多机会。我推荐使用 Surfer SEO，它不仅能优化你的内容排名，还能帮助你更好地了解访客行为，从而抓住更多商机。
pitch_copy_en: SaaS companies often struggle to identify and understand website visitors, leading to missed opportunities. I recommend using Surfer SEO, which not only optimizes your content ranking but also helps you better understand visitor behavior, thus capturing more business opportunities.

pain_summary: Entrepreneurs need guidance on when and how to pivot their business strategies to achieve success.
pitch_copy: 在创业过程中，适时调整策略是非常重要的。我推荐使用 Beehiiv 这样的邮件营销平台来收集用户反馈，更好地了解市场需求。这样可以帮助你及时调整方向，提高成功的几率。
pitch_copy_en: In the entrepreneurial journey, it's crucial to pivot your strategy at the right time. I recommend using a newsletter platform like Beehiiv to gather user feedback and better understand market demands. This will help you make timely adjustments and increase your chances of success.
